financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company made good money from more passengers, but unexpected costs and currency issues hurt profits.
They have enough cash for future plans, but high debt and rising costs are concerns.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Moderate Risk
bullets: The company is at moderate risk because it owes a lot of money in U.S. dollars, which could be affected by currency changes.
New labor rules in India might make running the company more expensive, and recent flight issues have upset customers.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well in taking care of its employees and community.
The company manages its leadership and decision-making processes effectively.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The leaders showed strong confidence in how the company is handling its challenges and reaching important goals.
They were careful when talking about future money matters, showing a mix of optimism and caution.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company was clear about how it runs day-to-day but not about its future plans.
When asked about future expectations, the company gave unclear answers without much detail.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well overall, with plans to grow and introduce new products despite some recent challenges.
They are expanding internationally and adding new planes, which is a good sign for future growth.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well because it has a lot of money saved up to handle problems and grow.
They are expanding with new planes and routes, which could help them make more money in the future.
